testcase.name: shouldFindByUserIdAndDeletedAtIsNull
testcase.system-out:

if exists users cascade 2026-02-24T17:52:21.275-03:00 DEBUG 14988 --- [leadflow-backend] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table public.roles ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, name varchar(50) not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_roles_name unique (name) ) 2026-02-24T17:52:21.279-03:00 DEBUG 14988 --- [leadflow-backend] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table public.tenants ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, name varchar(100) not null, schema_name varchar(100) not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_tenants_schema_name unique (schema_name) ) 2026-02-24T17:52:21.284-03:00 DEBUG 14988 --- [leadflow-backend] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create index idx_tenants_schema_name on public.tenants (schema_name) 2026-02-24T17:52:21.286-03:00 DEBUG 14988 --- [leadflow-backend] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table lead_status_history ( changed_at timestamp(6) not null, changed_by uuid, id uuid not null, lead_id uuid not null, status varchar(30) not null check (status in ('NEW','CONTACTED','QUALIFIED','CLOSED')), primary key (id) ) 2026-02-24T17:52:21.290-03:00 DEBUG 14988 --- [leadflow-backend] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table leads ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, phone varchar(20), status varchar(30) not null check (status in ('NEW','CONTACTED','QUALIFIED','CLOSED')), email varchar(150) not null, name varchar(150) not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_leads_email_user unique (email, user_id) ) 2026-02-24T17:52:21.295-03:00 DEBUG 14988 --- [leadflow-backend] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table logs ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid, action TEXT not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-02-24T17:52:21.302-03:00 DEBUG 14988 --- [leadflow-backend] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table settings ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, whatsapp varchar(15) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, company_name varchar(100), vendor_name varchar(100) not null, logo TEXT, welcome_message TEXT, primary key (id) ) 2026-02-24T17:52:21.306-03:00 DEBUG 14988 --- [leadflow-backend] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table users ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, role_id uuid not null, email varchar(150) not null, name varchar(150) not null, password varchar(255) not null, primary key (id), constraint uq_users_email unique (email) ) 2026-02-24T17:52:21.309-03:00 DEBUG 14988 --- [leadflow-backend] [ main]
